How it works

However it gets on the list,
we’re on top of it.

Homeowner

Add it to the list.

See something that needs fixing? Add it to your list in seconds. Your Dandyman will review it, come prepared, and take it from there.

Your Dandyman

We’ll flag what we notice.

We spot small issues, suggest what should happen next, and help take care of problems before they grow.

"The caulk around your tub is beginning to lift. We should take care of that before water gets behind it."
Routine care

Dandy keeps track.

The routine care every home needs is folded into your visits automatically, so it does not become one more thing for you to remember.

Built around your home

Choose a cadence that's right
for your home.

Every membership includes 1.5 hours of handyman work a month. Take it monthly, or take it as a fully prepared half-day each quarter that clears out the list.

MONTHLY

Short visits

1.5 hours per month

Short visits give you ~1.5 hours with your Dandyman to take care of the repairs that are difficult to ignore.

  • A steady monthly rhythm — small repairs never get the chance to pile up.
  • Add tasks anytime — they're queued and ready for your next visit.
  • Same prepared Dandy visit, just bite-sized.
A short visit
✦ Parts & supplies prepped before arrival
✓Fix the running toilet
✓Rehang the closet door
In and out — two things off the list.
or
QUARTERLY

Half-day visits

A half-day, once a quarter
  • Dedicated time to work through the repairs, maintenance, and lingering small projects that have accumulated around the house.
  • Before we arrive, the Dandy team reviews your list and preps the parts and supplies — so more of the day is spent getting things done.
  • You'll be surprised how much comes off the list.

Limited spots

One great handyman.
One neighborhood.
50 spots.

We find a top 1% handyman to join the Dandy team and dedicate them to one part of Atlanta. When that neighborhood opens, all 50 memberships drop on the same day. Once they’re claimed, we move on to the next.

✦We’re bringing Dandy to Atlanta one neighborhood at a time. Be first to know when yours opens.

Questions

Fair asks.

How do the visits work?＋
Every month includes 1.5 hours of handyman work. Take it as a monthly short visit, or as a fully prepared half-day each quarter — most members choose the half-day, and you can switch cadences anytime in the app.
Is it really the same handyman every time?＋
Yes — that's the whole product. Your Dandyman is a full-time, background-checked Dandy employee assigned to about 50 homes in your neighborhood, including yours. If he's ever out sick, we'll tell you before the visit, never surprise you at the door.
What counts as autopilot?＋
Routine care every home needs: HVAC filter swaps, smoke detector batteries, first-story gutter checks, weatherstripping and caulk inspection, dryer vent clearing, and seasonal checks. Your Dandyman folds them into visits automatically.
What kinds of tasks does my Dandyman handle?＋
Hundreds of common home tasks — preventative maintenance like HVAC filters, water heater flushes, and safety checks, plus everyday repairs like fixtures, drywall, caulking, and installs. If it can be safely completed during your scheduled visit, there's a good chance we can help. See what Dandy covers →
What if a job is too big for a visit?＋
Your Dandyman will tell you straight, help you scope it, and connect you with a vetted specialist. We'd rather protect your trust than stretch a job.
Can I cancel?＋
Anytime, month-to-month. Fair warning: your neighborhood spot goes back into the drop, and drops sell out.
✦
